stage.subtitle_ar: من عرض السعر إلى تحصيل المبلغ — هنا تتقن لغة المال التي يقوم عليها عملك كل يوم.

content.intro_ar: كل يوم في عملك تكتب عرض سعر لعميل أو ترسل فاتورة بعد إصلاح سيارة. في هذا الدرس تتعلّم الكلمات الإنجليزية الأساسية لعروض الأسعار والفواتير، وكيف توضّح للعميل ماذا سيدفع ولماذا. هذه مهارة تستخدمها في الورشة والمعرض كل أسبوع.

vocab.meaning_en: a price you offer before the work starts
vocab.example: I will send you a quote for the repair.

vocab.meaning_en: a paper that shows what to pay
vocab.example: The invoice shows the total price.

vocab.meaning_en: the money you ask for something
vocab.example: The price of the oil change is 150 riyals.

vocab.meaning_en: all the money together
vocab.example: The total is 600 riyals.

vocab.meaning_en: money you take off the price
vocab.example: I can give you a 10% discount.

vocab.meaning_en: money you pay to the government
vocab.example: The price includes 15% tax.

vocab.meaning_en: a person who buys from you
vocab.example: The customer wants a quote first.

vocab.meaning_en: pieces you use to fix a car
vocab.example: The parts cost 400 riyals.

vocab.meaning_en: the cost of the work, not the parts
vocab.example: Labor for this job is 200 riyals.

vocab.meaning_en: the day the customer must pay
vocab.example: The due date is on the invoice.

vocab.meaning_en: to make something go to a person
vocab.example: I send the invoice by WhatsApp.

paragraphs: Faisal has a workshop in the industrial area. Today a customer, Mr. Salem, comes with his car. The air conditioner does not work. Faisal checks the car and writes a quote. The quote shows the price of the parts and the labor.

The parts cost 400 riyals. The labor is 200 riyals. The total is 600 riyals, plus 15% tax. Mr. Salem asks, "Can you give me a discount?" Faisal says, "Yes, I can give you 5% because you are an old customer."

Mr. Salem agrees, and Faisal fixes the car. In the evening, Faisal sends the invoice by WhatsApp. The invoice shows the parts, the labor, the discount, the tax, and the total. It also shows the due date. Mr. Salem pays the next day and says, "Thank you, the invoice is very clear."

key_phrases.en: I will send you a quote today.
The total is 600 riyals, including tax.
This price includes parts and labor.
key_phrases.ar: هذا السعر يشمل قطع الغيار وأجرة العمل.

key_phrases.en: Can I send the invoice by WhatsApp?
key_phrases.ar: هل أرسل لك الفاتورة عبر واتساب؟

key_phrases.en: The due date is on the invoice.
I can give you a small discount.

comprehension.question: What is wrong with Mr. Salem's car?
options: The air conditioner does not work
comprehension.correct: The air conditioner does not work
comprehension.explanation_ar: جاء سالم إلى الورشة لأن مكيّف السيارة لا يعمل.

comprehension.question: What does the quote show?
options: The price of the parts and the labor
comprehension.correct: The price of the parts and the labor
comprehension.explanation_ar: عرض السعر يوضّح سعر قطع الغيار وأجرة العمل قبل بدء الإصلاح.

comprehension.question: How much is the labor?
comprehension.explanation_ar: أجرة العمل ٢٠٠ ريال، وقطع الغيار ٤٠٠ ريال.

comprehension.question: Why does Faisal give a discount?
options: Because Mr. Salem is an old customer
comprehension.correct: Because Mr. Salem is an old customer
comprehension.explanation_ar: قال فيصل إنه يمنح الخصم لأن سالم عميل قديم.

comprehension.question: When does Faisal send the invoice?
options: In the evening, after the work
comprehension.correct: In the evening, after the work
comprehension.explanation_ar: أرسل فيصل الفاتورة عبر واتساب في المساء بعد إنهاء العمل.

task.prompt_en: Write a short quote for a customer: name the repair, the price of the parts, the labor, and the total.
task.prompt_ar: اكتب عرض سعر قصيراً لعميل: اذكر نوع الإصلاح، وسعر قطع الغيار، وأجرة العمل، والإجمالي.
task.guidance_ar: استخدم ٤ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، واكتب الأسعار بالريال السعودي.

content.intro_ar: بعد أن يوافق العميل على الفاتورة تأتي الخطوة الأهم: تحصيل المبلغ. في هذا الدرس تتعلّم كيف تتحدّث بالإنجليزية عن طرق الدفع المختلفة — نقداً أو بالبطاقة أو بالتحويل البنكي — وكيف تتابع بأدب فاتورة تأخّر سدادها. لغة واضحة هنا تعني تدفقاً نقدياً أفضل لعملك.

vocab.meaning_en: money paid for goods or work
vocab.example: We received your payment this morning.

vocab.meaning_en: physical money, notes and coins
vocab.example: Some customers still prefer to pay in cash.

vocab.meaning_en: sending money from one bank account to another
vocab.example: You can pay by bank transfer to our account.

vocab.meaning_en: part of the price paid before the work starts
vocab.example: We ask for a 30% deposit before we order the parts.

vocab.meaning_en: one of several smaller payments over time
vocab.example: He is paying for the car in twelve installments.

vocab.meaning_en: a paper that proves you paid
vocab.example: Always give the customer a receipt after payment.

vocab.meaning_en: the money that is still left to pay
vocab.example: The balance is due when the car is ready.

vocab.meaning_en: not paid by the due date
vocab.example: This invoice is two weeks overdue.

vocab.meaning_en: money given back to the customer
vocab.example: We gave him a full refund for the faulty part.

vocab.meaning_en: to say that something is certain or received
vocab.example: Please confirm the payment when it arrives.

paragraphs: Faisal's workshop accepts three ways of payment: cash, card, and bank transfer. Most customers pay by card at the counter, but companies usually prefer a bank transfer. For big jobs, such as an engine repair, Faisal asks for a 30% deposit before he orders the parts. The balance is paid when the car is ready.

Last month, a company with five delivery cars asked to pay in installments. Faisal agreed to three monthly payments, because the company has been a customer for years. After each payment, he sends a receipt and confirms that the money has arrived.

Sometimes a payment becomes overdue. Faisal does not get angry; he sends a short, polite message: "Good morning. A friendly reminder that invoice 2141 is now overdue. Could you confirm the payment date?" This polite style has worked well — most customers pay within a few days.

Refunds are rare, but they happen. When a new part failed after one week, Faisal replaced it and gave a partial refund. The customer was surprised and happy, and he later recommended the workshop to two friends. Clear payments and fair refunds build trust — and trust brings customers back.

key_phrases.en: How would you like to pay — cash, card, or bank transfer?
key_phrases.ar: كيف تفضّل الدفع — نقداً أم بالبطاقة أم بالتحويل البنكي؟

key_phrases.en: We ask for a 30% deposit before we start.
key_phrases.ar: نطلب عربوناً بنسبة ٣٠٪ قبل أن نبدأ.

key_phrases.en: The balance is due when the car is ready.
key_phrases.ar: يُسدَّد المبلغ المتبقي عند جاهزية السيارة.

key_phrases.en: I will send you the receipt right away.
A friendly reminder: the invoice is now overdue.
key_phrases.ar: تذكير ودّي: الفاتورة تجاوزت موعد السداد.

key_phrases.en: Could you confirm the payment date?

comprehension.question: Which customers usually prefer a bank transfer?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الشركات عادةً تفضّل التحويل البنكي، بينما يدفع معظم الأفراد بالبطاقة.

comprehension.question: When does Faisal ask for a deposit?
options: Before he orders parts for big jobs
comprehension.correct: Before he orders parts for big jobs
comprehension.explanation_ar: في الأعمال الكبيرة يطلب فيصل عربوناً بنسبة ٣٠٪ قبل طلب قطع الغيار.

comprehension.question: Why did Faisal accept installments from the company?
options: Because it has been a customer for years
comprehension.correct: Because it has been a customer for years
comprehension.explanation_ar: وافق فيصل على الأقساط لأن الشركة عميل قديم منذ سنوات.

comprehension.question: What does Faisal do when an invoice is overdue?
options: He asks for the car back
He sends a short, polite reminder
comprehension.correct: He sends a short, polite reminder
comprehension.explanation_ar: يرسل فيصل رسالة تذكير قصيرة ومهذّبة، وهذا الأسلوب ينجح غالباً.

comprehension.question: What happened after Faisal gave a partial refund?
options: The customer recommended the workshop to friends
The customer asked for more money
comprehension.correct: The customer recommended the workshop to friends
comprehension.explanation_ar: المبلغ المسترد وحسن التعامل جعلا العميل يرشّح الورشة لصديقين.

task.prompt_en: Record yourself explaining your payment options to a customer: the deposit, the balance, and how to pay.
task.prompt_ar: سجّل نفسك وأنت تشرح لعميل خيارات الدفع لديك: العربون، والمبلغ المتبقي، وطرق السداد.
task.guidance_ar: تحدّث لمدة ٣٠–٦٠ ثانية، واستخدم ٤ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس.

content.intro_ar: السعر الصحيح هو الفرق بين ورشة تربح وورشة تتعب بلا فائدة. في هذا الدرس تتعلّم بالإنجليزية الفرق بين التكاليف الثابتة والمتغيّرة، وكيف تحسب هامش الربح، وكيف تشرح سعرك بثقة عندما يقول العميل: «السعر مرتفع!». أنت تعرف هذه الحسابات في عملك — الآن ستتقنها بالإنجليزية.

vocab.meaning_en: the money you spend to run your business
vocab.example: The real cost of the job is higher than the parts alone.

vocab.meaning_en: costs that stay the same every month, like rent
vocab.example: Rent and salaries are fixed costs.

vocab.meaning_en: costs that change with the amount of work
vocab.example: Parts and oil are variable costs.

vocab.meaning_en: money paid to use a building
vocab.example: The rent for the workshop is 12,000 riyals a month.

vocab.meaning_en: money paid to a worker every month
vocab.example: Each technician receives a monthly salary.

vocab.meaning_en: the difference between the price and the cost, as a percentage
vocab.example: A 25% profit margin keeps the workshop healthy.

vocab.meaning_en: the amount you add to the cost to make the selling price
vocab.example: He adds a 30% markup on spare parts.

vocab.meaning_ar: يغطي التكاليف بلا ربح أو خسارة
vocab.meaning_en: to earn just enough to cover your costs
vocab.example: The workshop needs forty jobs a month to break even.

vocab.meaning_en: money spent to run the business
vocab.example: Write down all your expenses every week.

vocab.meaning_en: another business that offers the same service
vocab.example: A new competitor opened across the street.

vocab.meaning_en: what something is worth to the customer
vocab.example: Customers pay for value, not only for a low price.

reading.title_ar: كم يجب أن يكون سعر الإصلاح؟
paragraphs: Many workshop owners set their prices by copying a competitor. Faisal used to do the same, until he studied his real costs. First, he wrote down his fixed costs: the rent, the salaries of his three technicians, insurance, and electricity. These expenses stay the same whether he repairs five cars a day or fifteen.

Next, he looked at his variable costs — parts, oil, and cleaning materials. These change with every job. When he added everything together, Faisal discovered that his workshop needs about 40,000 riyals a month just to break even. Below that number, he is losing money.

With these numbers, pricing became clearer. Faisal now adds a fair markup on parts and includes the cost of labor in every quote. He aims for a profit margin of around 20% on each job. When a customer says the price is high, he explains the value calmly: original parts, trained technicians, and a six-month guarantee.
A low price can bring customers once, but value brings them back. Since Faisal started pricing from his real costs, his profit has grown — and he no longer worries when a competitor cuts prices.

key_phrases.en: The price includes parts, labor, and a six-month guarantee.
key_phrases.ar: السعر يشمل قطع الغيار وأجرة العمل وضماناً لستة أشهر.

key_phrases.en: Our costs have gone up, so our prices changed this year.
key_phrases.ar: ارتفعت تكاليفنا، لذلك تغيّرت أسعارنا هذا العام.

key_phrases.en: This is a fair price for original parts.
key_phrases.ar: هذا سعر عادل مقابل قطع غيار أصلية.

key_phrases.en: We need to cover our costs and make a small profit.
key_phrases.ar: نحتاج إلى تغطية تكاليفنا وتحقيق ربح بسيط.

key_phrases.en: You are paying for quality and value, not just the part.
key_phrases.ar: أنت تدفع مقابل الجودة والقيمة، وليس مقابل القطعة فقط.

key_phrases.en: I can explain how we calculated this price.
key_phrases.ar: أستطيع أن أشرح لك كيف حسبنا هذا السعر.

comprehension.question: How did Faisal set his prices in the past?
comprehension.explanation_ar: كان فيصل يقلّد أسعار المنافس قبل أن يدرس تكاليفه الحقيقية.

comprehension.question: Which of these is a fixed cost?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الإيجار تكلفة ثابتة لا تتغيّر مع عدد السيارات، بعكس الزيت وقطع الغيار.

comprehension.question: What does "break even" mean in the reading?
options: To earn just enough to cover the costs
To make a very big profit
comprehension.correct: To earn just enough to cover the costs
comprehension.explanation_ar: نقطة التعادل تعني أن الدخل يغطي التكاليف فقط، بلا ربح ولا خسارة.

comprehension.question: What profit margin does Faisal aim for on each job?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يستهدف فيصل هامش ربح يقارب ٢٠٪ في كل عملية إصلاح.

comprehension.question: According to the reading, what brings customers back?
options: The lowest price in the city
comprehension.explanation_ar: السعر المنخفض قد يجذب العميل مرة واحدة، لكن القيمة تجعله يعود.

task.prompt_en: Write 4–5 sentences explaining your price to a customer who says it is too expensive.
task.prompt_ar: اكتب ٤–٥ جُمل تشرح فيها سعرك لعميل يقول إن السعر مرتفع.
task.guidance_ar: استخدم ٤ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، واذكر القيمة التي يحصل عليها العميل مقابل السعر.
